items.title: Erling Haaland brutally tells new £116m Man City pal Elliot Anderson to get on the weights in shock World Cup row
items.summary: ERLING HAALAND told his new Manchester City team-mate Elliot Anderson to get on the weights. Anderson, 23, signed for the Etihad club in a record-breaking £116million transfer from Nottingham Forest during the World Cup. And the pair got to know each other in the England penalty area. items.title: Erling Haaland hails superstar pal Jude Bellingham for heroics vs Norway and rekindles England fandom for World Cup
items.summary: ERLING HAALAND hailed superstar pal Jude Bellingham’s match-winning performance - and now wants England to win the World Cup. items.title: Senegal sack manager Thiaw in wake of World Cup exit
items.summary: Senegal sack manager Pape Thiaw in the aftermath of the country's exit at the last-32 stage of the 2026 World Cup.
